Our Story

We Built the Platform
We Wished Existed.

Every financial website we used was either selling us products, hiding fees, or giving us advice that benefited them — not us. So in 2021, we built something different: a financial platform that puts advice before products, always.

Our Mission

To democratize access to unbiased financial expertise — so that every Indian, regardless of income or background, can make confident, well-informed financial decisions.

Our Vision

A future where no Indian ever makes a financial decision in the dark — where expert guidance, transparent comparisons, and trusted products are available to everyone, everywhere.

The Problem We're Solving

Most financial platforms are designed to maximize product sales, not user outcomes.

❌

Hidden Commissions

Advisors on traditional platforms are paid commissions by product companies — creating a direct conflict of interest with users.

❌

Comparison Sites Sell Too

Popular comparison websites charge institutions for featured placement, making 'top rankings' meaningless and often misleading.

❌

No Holistic View

Most platforms focus on one product category. No single place helps you see your entire financial picture and plan across it.

FinWise solves all three.

What We Stand For

Our values shape every decision we make — from the products we feature to the advisors we verify.

Integrity Above All

We never take undisclosed commissions. Our advisors are paid by users, not product companies — ensuring unbiased guidance every time.

People Over Products

We begin with understanding your financial situation, not with selling you a product. Your goals come first, always.

Radical Simplicity

Financial decisions should feel clear, not confusing. We obsess over making complexity simple, and jargon plain.

Outcome Focused

We measure success not by products sold, but by the quality of decisions our users make and the wealth they build.

Complete Transparency

Every comparison is neutral. Every rate is verified. Every advisor credential is checked. No sponsored placements.

Long-Term Partnership

We believe financial guidance is a relationship, not a transaction. Our advisors are partners across every life milestone.

Our Journey

2021

FinWise Founded

Started with 5 advisors and a simple comparison tool

1
2022

SEBI Registration

Obtained SEBI Investment Advisor platform license

2
2023

1L Customers

Crossed 100,000 customers served across India

3
2024

Series A

Raised ₹120 Cr to expand advisor network and products

4
2025

2,400+ Advisors

Expanded to 80 cities with verified financial experts

5

Leadership Team

Built by former Goldman Sachs, Flipkart, and HDFC Securities professionals who understand both finance and technology.

KM

Karan Malhotra

Co-Founder & CEO

Ex-Goldman Sachs, IIT Bombay

Previously built India's first robo-advisory platform. 14 years in financial services across US, Singapore, and India.

SA

Sanya Agarwal

Co-Founder & CTO

Ex-Flipkart, BITS Pilani

Led engineering at Flipkart's fintech division. Deep expertise in building consumer-grade financial technology at scale.

RJ

Rohit Joshi

Chief Investment Officer

SEBI RIA, CFA, IIM Ahmedabad

20 years of wealth management experience. Former Head of Advisory at HDFC Securities. SEBI Registered Investment Advisor.

PN

Preethi Nair

VP, Advisor Network

Ex-Paytm Money, NIT Calicut

Built and scaled a network of 2,400+ certified financial advisors across 80+ cities in India since 2022.
